untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection requires identification of five specific local extrema (E1, E2, E3, E4, E5) with precise amplitude and proximity relationships. This requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond the allowed indicator set. The conditions reference undefined THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameters and require multi-bar lookback analysis with local maxima/minima detection that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and Bar Properties). Kernel regression smoothing and extrema detection are not available as pre-computed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires sophisticated chart pattern recognition with kernel-smoothed local extrema detection. A practical implementation would require a custom indicator computing: (1) kernel-smoothed price series, (2) local maximum/minimum detection over rolling windows, (3) amplitude comparisons between head (E3) and shoulders (E2, E4), and (4) proximity validation. The provided entry_short condition is a placeholder using price proximity to smoothed trend, but does not capture the true head-and-shoulders logic. Threshold parameters are undefined in the source material.
